---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea, an improvement, or a new direction for the project.
title: "[feature] "
labels: ["enhancement"]
---

## Summary

<!--
A short description of what you are proposing. One or two sentences.
-->

## Motivation

<!--
What problem does this solve, or what value does it add?
Who benefits from it, and in what context?
If this proposal is informed by a specific operational context
(humanitarian, technical, regulatory), please describe it.
-->

## Proposal

<!--
A more detailed description of what you are proposing.
This can be a sketch, an architectural idea, a reference to an existing
solution in another project, or a specific change to the system as
currently described in the documentation.
-->

## Alternatives considered

<!--
What other approaches have you considered, and why did you discard them?
This helps us understand the design space you have already explored.
-->

## Out of scope (optional)

<!--
What this proposal explicitly does NOT cover, to avoid the discussion
drifting into adjacent topics.
-->

## Additional context

<!--
Links, references, or background that would help us evaluate the proposal.
-->
